synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-21069 Oracle Linux 8 gcc-toolset-14-gcc bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21069
description:
[14.2.1-10]
- Put the libstdc++ AS_NEEDED in the right places (RHEL-84606)

[14.2.1-9]
- Add AS_NEEDED libstdc++.so.6 when only needed through libstdc++_nonshared
  (RHEL-84606)

[14.2.1-8]
- libstdc++: Fix -Warray-bounds warning in std::vector<bool> (RHEL-49861)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21069

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-21069.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

Description of changes:

[14.2.1-10]
- Put the libstdc++ AS_NEEDED in the right places (RHEL-84606)

[14.2.1-9]
- Add AS_NEEDED libstdc++.so.6 when only needed through libstdc++_nonshared
  (RHEL-84606)

[14.2.1-8]
- libstdc++: Fix -Warray-bounds warning in std::vector<bool> (RHEL-49861)
